$schema: Per-1M-token prices in USD. Snapshot of each provider's published pricing as of the AVP build date; consumers operating in production SHOULD override with their own price file via `compute_cost(prices=...)` or `AVP_PRICES_PATH=/path/to/prices.json` rather than rely on the bundled values staying current.
$cache_write_convention: cache_write is the 5-minute-cache-write rate for Anthropic. For OpenAI's prompt-caching, cache_read is the discounted input rate; cache_write is left 0 because OpenAI does not bill a separate cache-creation surcharge (writes are billed at the standard input rate). v0.1's single-rate model encodes only the read discount.
